subcodes.first_line: O beloved friend! Thou embodied light celestial, manifest expression of divine mercy, heavenly being of innate nobility [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یار عزیزا نورانیت مجسمه آسمانی رحمانیت مشخصه سبحانی یه انسان انجق علویت فطرت
subcodes.subjects: @human soul as mirror; divine light, attributes within, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
